name: Cheese Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in boiling water until tender, about 30 minutes.
2. Drain and let cool to touch. Peel and cut into 1/4-inch strips. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine butter or margarine with salt, pepper, sour cream, chicken soup, cheese, and stuffing mix.
4. Gently stir in the cooled potatoes.
5. Spoon the mixture into a lightly greased baking dish (13x9x2 inches).
6. Sprinkle the remaining melted butter over the potato mixture.
7. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 25 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
